title: T-020 — UI: FA detail tabs shell (Core/Planning/Commercial/Production/Technical/MRP/Procurement/History)
prompt:
# T-020 — FA detail tabs shell

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §3, §5 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md fa_detail
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:300-401 (fa_detail) + line 404-452 (fa_right_panel)

## Goal
Server Component page /(npd)/fa/[productCode] rendering tabbed shell with 8 dept tabs (Core/Planning/Commercial/Production/Technical/MRP/Procurement/History) using shadcn Tabs, plus right-side panel showing status_overall + days_to_launch + built indicator.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/page.tsx + layout.tsx. Tabs URL-driven via ?tab=core. Each tab is a route group module loading its dept slice. Right panel is a sticky aside RSC reading fa_status_overall view. Each tab placeholder (just header + 'TBD-empty' state); subsequent tasks (T-023..T-028) fill content.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/layout.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_components/fa-tabs.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_components/fa-right-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_components/__tests__/fa-tabs.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:300-452 (fa_detail + fa_right_panel), then it has the same 8 tab labels in same order, a sticky right panel with status pill+days+built, and uses shadcn Tabs+Card primitives (no HTML role='tablist') — verified by RTL test counting tabs + parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction parity)
2. Given ?tab=technical in URL, when page renders, then Technical tab is active
3. Given browser back after tab switch, when navigation occurs, then the previous active tab is restored

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL tests for tab count, URL persistence, primitive parity
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test fa-tabs'

## Risk red lines
- Do not use HTML role='tablist' instead of shadcn Tabs
- Do not include content in this task (only shell)
- Do not skip URL persistence for tabs

pipeline_inputs.description: Tabbed FA detail page shell (8 dept tabs + sticky right panel) matching fa_detail prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity checklist: (1) 8 tab labels in same order Core/Planning/Commercial/Production/Technical/MRP/Procurement/History; (2) sticky right panel with status pill, days_to_launch, Built; (3) shadcn Tabs+Card primitives only; (4) URL ?tab=<slug> persistence; (5) browser back/forward restores tab. Subsequent tasks fill tab content.
